name: optimize-agent-md
description: Audit and split a monolithic CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md into a router + per-area rule files under .claude/rules/ or .agents/rules/. Detects stale or copy-pasted rules that do not match the current repo (libraries not installed, paths that do not exist, wrong tooling) and drops them before splitting. For Claude Code, optionally promotes rule files into discoverable .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md skills (hybrid for always-on disciplines, drop redundant ones) and migrates dormant flat skill files. Manual invocation only.
